creator: dsh@vlink.ru
text:
How-To-Repeat: 
diff -Nru p5-HTML-Mason.orig/Makefile p5-HTML-Mason/Makefile
--- p5-HTML-Mason.orig/Makefile	Fri May 18 11:02:46 2001
+++ p5-HTML-Mason/Makefile	Fri May 18 11:03:03 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	HTML-Mason
-PORTVERSION=	1.02
+PORTVERSION=	1.03
 CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_PERL_CPAN}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	HTML
diff -Nru p5-HTML-Mason.orig/distinfo p5-HTML-Mason/distinfo
--- p5-HTML-Mason.orig/distinfo	Fri May 18 11:02:46 2001
+++ p5-HTML-Mason/distinfo	Fri May 18 11:03:44 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (HTML-Mason-1.02.tar.gz) = 47a64b6c6f7885fa7192c7a9382fa998
+MD5 (HTML-Mason-1.03.tar.gz) = 7b914a712b0b58194d80701d27dca2aa
